briefing: Gateway console must validate stream throughput for media relay.
prompt: Assemble formula modules and verify final throughput in bps.
logs: Pipeline target asks for bps
Do not skip x8 byte-to-bit conversion.
Use binary base 1024 for KB/MB in this stage.
analyze_lines: Module x1000 is a trap for this case.
Module /1 is a trap because it ignores time window.
Output module must match target unit before confirmation.

feedback.headline: Benchmark report complete
feedback.details: Compare computed value with target unit before confirming.

modules_pool.meaning: Decimal trap; not used in this exam.

explain_short: Computed throughput is 67200 bps with correct conversion chain.
explain_full: Correct chain: payload -> x1024 -> x8 -> /time -> output unit. Wrong modules cause deterministic arithmetic drift.
